explanations.13: useBlogPost() is a hook that gives us information about whether we're currently viewing the full blog post page (true) or just a preview in a list (false).
explanations.14: This returns a CSS class name to add spacing only when viewing previews in a list, not when viewing the full post itself.
explanations.24: This checks if we're on the full blog post page, and only then renders the SeriesPosts component to show related posts in the same series.
explanations.26: metadata.frontMatter.series accesses the 'series' field from the blog post's front matter — that's the metadata block at the top of the markdown file.
explanations.35: SeriesPosts appears twice in this code, once near the top of the post and once at the bottom, to show related posts in context at both locations.
